finalized_plan.description: Use the search_agent to obtain the bibliographic details and full texts (or substantial excerpts) of Ilias Lagkouvardos’s paper and Olga Tapia’s paper on the alvei species, ensuring that only the main texts (excluding bibliographies) are considered
Confirm from one or both sources that the alvei species belongs to the genus named for Copenhagen, to ensure proper context
Extract a list of all animal mentions that appear in the main text of Ilias Lagkouvardos’s paper
Similarly, extract a list of all animal mentions that appear in the main text of Olga Tapia’s paper
Identify the intersection of these two lists to determine which animals are common to both papers
Use the search_agent to locate and access the 2021 article cited on the alvei species’ Wikipedia page, specifically the multicenter, randomized, double-blind study
Extract the list of animal mentions from the 2021 study
Perform an intersection between the common animals from Lagkouvardos’s and Tapia’s papers (from Step 5) and the animal list from the 2021 study
Return the final set of animals as the answer using the final_answer tool

root_cause_reasoning: The agent did not invoke the search tool but fabricated the answer instead.
